hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Trung tâm thành phố Bắc Giang (Tru by Hilton Bac Giang City Centre)

reviews.title: The hotel is quite good for the price range.
reviews.text: Everything is quite okay except the drinking water in the room is very limited, with only 2 bottles of 350ml for free, and if bought at the counter, it costs 30k per 500ml Dasani bottle.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Cường
We are delighted to receive your feedback regarding the quality of service at Tru by Hilton Bac Giang City Centre.

We are very pleased to know that you highly appreciate the value of the services provided by our hotel. Your suggestions for improving our service quality are extremely valuable to us. We will take them into careful consideration as we continuously strive to enhance our services in the future.

Once again, thank you very much, and we sincerely hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future.

Yours sincerely,
Tran Anh Tuan
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great staff, great location, clean rooms, good views
reviews.negatives: Had to switch rooms 3 times due to broken AC systems in previous 2 rooms. 3rd room was perfect.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Will definitely come back next time. The room is small but cozy and well-equipped, with a nice open view. The lounge is spacious and offers plenty of entertainment facilities. Just dissatisfied about the soundproofing. Overall, it was still a pleasant and enjoyable stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr Hoàng
We are delighted to receive your feedback regarding the quality of service at Tru by Hilton Bac Giang City Centre.

We are very pleased to know that you highly appreciate the value of the services provided by our hotel. Your suggestions for improving our service quality are extremely valuable to us. We will take them into careful consideration as we continuously strive to enhance our services in the future.

Once again, thank you very much, and we sincerely hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the near future.

Yours sincerely,
Tran Anh Tuan
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: I happy with everything
reviews.positives: Great for one night stop over

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It feels like a campus, everything is good and new, clean. The breakfast menu is quite simple. Staffs are friendly. The location is in the center of city
reviews.response:
Thank you for choosing Tru by Hilton Bac Giang City Center

We hope you had a wonderful experience at our hotel, and we look forward to welcoming you warmly on your next stay.

Sincerely,

Tran Anh Tuan

Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Very friendly and helpful staff from checkin to stay. We are happy with the service and our stay.
reviews.negatives: Perhaps add a second chair in the double bed room.

reviews.title: Good hotel.
reviews.text: I have been using this hotel since it was still SOJO. Recently, they changed the name and also changed the service. Now, breakfast is included and they reduced the items in the room, leaving only 2 toothbrushes. The cleaning staff said it takes 3 days to change the blankets, sheets, and pillows... I find it unreasonable.

reviews.title: Parfait pour l’hébergement et le confort de la chambre. Hôtel bien situé en centre ville.
reviews.positives: Emplacement. Chambre très fonctionnelle, moderne, literie très bonne. Laverie et salle de sport très appréciables.
reviews.negatives: Petit déjeuner très moyen : plats chauds inexistants, pain rassis proposé deux jours de suite … assez décevant.

reviews.title: Good Hotel
reviews.text: Khách sạn ổn, nhiều tiện ích.

reviews.title: Ich würde dort nicht wieder buchen
reviews.negatives: Nasszelle wie in einem Etap Hotel, Wasserdruck der Dusche katastrophal, Toilette dreckig, Personal unwissend, Frühstück für Europäer nicht wirklich geeignet. Selbst einheimische beklagten Pho mit extrem viel Glutamat und Zucker.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel
reviews.text: Clean hotel, full facilities. Located in the city center so it is convenient to move. Behind the hotel there is Sau restaurant that cooks delicious dishes from sea urchin.

reviews.title: Mondernes sauberes Hotel
reviews.positives: Sehr modernes schönes Zimmer ! Das Hotel ist in einem super Zustand und hat viel zu bieten. Die Lobby ist riesig und hat coole Aktivitäten zu bieten.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sạch, ngay tâm, có giặt ủi tiện.
reviews.negatives: Công tắc điện hơi rắc rối.

reviews.title: Tiện ích
reviews.text: Wifi lởm, đồ ăn sáng buffet ko ngon ko đa dạng.
reviews.response:
Greetings from Tru By Hilton Bac Giang City Centre!

The hotel sincerely thanks you for sharing your feedback. We are very pleased to know that you are satisfied with the enthusiasm of our staff. We have noted your comments regarding the wifi and breakfast and will check and improve them as soon as possible. We look forward to welcoming and serving you better during your future stays.

Sincerely,

Tran Anh Tuan

Guest Operations Manager
reviews.room_type: King Guest Room with Sofa Bed

reviews.title: Thật thú vị khi nghỉ tại đây vì tiện ích xung quanh khách sạn đi bộ xuống là có hết!
reviews.positives: Sự tiện nghi, phong cách trẻ trung và hiện đại của khách sạn.
reviews.negatives: Nếu đồ ăn sang phong phú hơn nữa thì tốt.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.response:
Thank you for choosing Tru by Hilton Bac Giang City Center

We hope you had a wonderful experience at our hotel, and we look forward to welcoming you warmly on your next stay.

Sincerely,

Tran Anh Tuan

Service Operations Manager

reviews.title: bình thường
reviews.positives: sạch sẽ, vị trí đẹp, thuận tiện
reviews.negatives: thiết kế P tiết kiệm quá, chỉ có chỗ treo quần áo chứ k có tủ quần áo nên khi treo quần áo lên bị vướng vào bàn chỗ rửa mặt. nhìn mất mỹ quan và bất tiện.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Phòng đẹp, tiện nghi tốt, cửa sổ tuyệt vời.
reviews.negatives: Lễ tân ở tận tầng 5, hơi bất tiện và khó tìm.

reviews.title: Xuất sắc
reviews.positives: Ấn tượng màu tím everywhere, rất đẹp. Mọi thứ sạch sẽ, sang trọng, chill chill. Sáng mai ngủ dậy, view xịn xò luôn

reviews.title: Pleased
reviews.positives: The interior decoration of the hotel, especially the lobby and bar areas. Artistic, modern and lively.
reviews.negatives: More dinning options and milk for breakfast.
